characters.description: The narrator, facing this school year without his best friend after a falling-out. Between hunting for a replacement friend, coping with new responsibilities at home, and squirming through the school's lessons on adolescence, he spends the book running up against the awkward business of growing up.
characters.name: Greg Heffley

characters.description: Greg's estranged best friend. The two are not speaking when the book opens, and their separation hangs over everything Greg does until a family wedding finally throws them back together.
characters.name: Rowley Jefferson

characters.description: Greg's teenage older brother, as ready as ever to make Greg's life harder at home.
characters.name: Rodrick Heffley

characters.description: Greg's father, adjusting along with the rest of the family when the household routine is shaken up.
characters.name: Frank Heffley

characters.description: Greg's mother, who goes back to school herself this year, leaving the men of the house to pick up the chores and cooking she normally handles.
characters.name: Susan Heffley

characters.description: One of Greg's uncles, a serial groom whose latest engagement gives the family a wedding to prepare for. The event ends up mattering more to Greg than the marriage itself.
characters.name: Uncle Gary
